title: Consultation: Proposed application of the definition of Canadian Reference Product (CRP) - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation: Proposed application of the definition of Canadian Reference Product (CRP)

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from March 27, 2023 to May 12, 2023.
Stakeholder feedback was received on a proposed application of the definition of Canadian Reference Product (CRP) in section C.08.001.1 of the Food and Drug Regulations

## Who was the focus of this consultation
- drug manufacturers (innovator and generic sectors)
- government and regulatory partners
- other interested stakeholders
To the extent possible, the stakeholder input that was gathered through this consultation was used to develop the Notice: Application of the definition of Canadian Reference Product .
Bureau of Policy, Science and International Programs Pharmaceutical Drugs Directorate Health Products and Food Branch Health Canada
E-mail: policy_bureau_enquiries@hc-sc.gc.ca
